detail.description:
Welcome to Mahjong Crush, a puzzle game that perfectly blends classic tile-matching with an immersive visual experience! Relax your mind in captivating layouts, solve layered puzzles through clever matches, and collect exquisite dynamic themes to build your own personal visual gallery.
🎴 Core Gameplay Features:
Innovative Mahjong Matching:​ Take on a "multi-layer matching" challenge, pair identical mahjong tiles, strategically plan each move, clear all obstacles, and enjoy the brain-teasing yet
